H5700.strongs_def: Eglon, the name of a place in Palestine and of a Moabitish king
H5700.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5703.strongs_def: properly, a (peremptory) terminus, i.e. (by implication) duration, in the sense of advance or perpetuity (substantially as a noun, either with or without a preposition)
H5703.kjv_def: eternity, ever(-lasting, -more), old, perpetually, [phrase] world without end.
H5703.usage: ever(41x), everlasting(2x), end(1x), eternity(1x), evermore(1x), old(1x), perpetually(1x)

H5704.derivation: properly, the same as H5703 (עַד) (used as a preposition, adverb or conjunction; especially with a preposition);
H5704.strongs_def: as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with)
H5704.kjv_def: against, and, as, at, before, by (that), even (to), for(-asmuch as), (hither-) to, [phrase] how long, into, as long (much) as, (so) that, till, toward, until, when, while, ([phrase] as) yet.

H5705.strongs_def: {as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with)}
H5705.kjv_def: [idiom] and, at, for, (hither-) to, on till, (un-) to, until, within.
H5705.usage: till(11x), until(5x), unto(4x), ever(2x), for(2x), to(2x), even(1x), on(1x), within(1x)

H5706.derivation: the same as H5703 (עַד) in the sense of the aim of an attack;

H5707.strongs_def: concretely, a witness; abstractly, testimony; specifically, a recorder, i.e. prince

H5708.derivation: from an unused root meaning to set a period (compare H5710 (עָדָה), H5749 (עוּד));
H5708.strongs_def: the menstrual flux (as periodical); by implication (in plural) soiling

H5709.strongs_def: {to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon)}

H5710.strongs_def: to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon)
H5710.kjv_def: adorn, deck (self), pass by, take away.

H5711.strongs_def: Adah, the name of two women

H5712.derivation: feminine of H5707 (עֵד) in the original sense of fixture;
H5712.strongs_def: a stated assemblage (specifically, a concourse, or generally, a family or crowd)
H5712.kjv_def: assembly, company, congregation, multitude, people, swarm. Compare H5713 (עֵדָה).
H5712.usage: congregation(124x), company(13x), assembly(9x), multitude(1x), people(1x), swarm(1x)

H5713.derivation: feminine of H5707 (עֵד) in its techn. sense;

H5714.derivation: or עִדּוֹא; or עִדִּיא; from H5710 (עָדָה); timely;
H5714.strongs_def: Iddo (or Iddi), the name of five Israelites

H5716.derivation: from H5710 (עָדָה) in the sense of trappings;
H5716.strongs_def: finery; generally an outfit; specifically, a headstall

H5717.derivation: from H5716 (עֲדִי) and H410 (אֵל); ornament of God;
H5717.strongs_def: Adiel, the name of three Israelites

H5718.derivation: or עֲדָיָהוּ; from H5710 (עָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has adorned;
H5718.strongs_def: Adajah, the name of eight Israelites

H5720.strongs_def: Adin, the name of two Israelites

H5722.derivation: probably from H5719 (עָדִין) in the original sense of slender (i.e. a spear);

H5723.derivation: dual of a feminine of H5706 (עַד); double prey;

H5724.derivation: probably from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H5725.derivation: probably from the passive participle of the same as H5724 (עַדְלַי);

H5726.strongs_def: an Adullamite or native of Adullam

H5727.strongs_def: to be soft or pleasant; figuratively and reflexively, to live voluptuously

H5728.derivation: or עֲדֶנָּה; from H5704 (עַד) and H2004 (הֵן);

H5730.kjv_def: delicate, delight, pleasure. See also H1040 (בֵּית עֵדֶן).

H5731.strongs_def: Eden, the region of Adam's home
H5731.pos: proper masculine noun, proper masculine locative noun

H5732.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of H5708 (עֵד);
H5732.strongs_def: a set time; technically, a year

H5733.strongs_def: Adna, the name of two Israelites

H5734.strongs_def: Adnah, the name of two Israelites

H5736.kjv_def: be more, odd number, be (have) over (and above), overplus, remain.

H5737.strongs_def: to arrange as a battle, a vineyard (to hoe); hence, to muster and so to miss (or find wanting)

H5740.strongs_def: Eder, the name of an Israelite and of two places in Palestine
H5740.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5741.derivation: from H5739 (עֵדֶר) and H410 (אֵל); flock of God;

H5742.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H5743.strongs_def: to be dense or dark, i.e. to becloud

H5744.strongs_def: Obed, the name of five Israelites

H5746.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to gyrate; but used only as a denominative from H5692 (עֻגָּה),
H5746.strongs_def: to bake (round cakes on the hearth)

H5748.derivation: or עֻגָּב; from H5689 (עֲגַב) in the original sense of breathing;

H5749.strongs_def: to duplicate or repeat; by implication, to protest, testify (as by reiteration); intensively, to encompass, restore (as a sort of reduplication)
H5749.kjv_def: admonish, charge, earnestly, lift up, protest, call (take) to record, relieve, rob, solemnly, stand upright, testify, give warning, (bear, call to, give, take to) witness.
H5749.usage: testify(15x), protest(6x), witness(6x), record(3x), charge(2x), solemnly(2x), take(3x), admonished(1x)

H5750.strongs_def: properly, iteration or continuance; used only adverbially (with or without preposition), again, repeatedly, still, more
H5750.kjv_def: again, [idiom] all life long, at all, besides, but, else, further(-more), henceforth, (any) longer, (any) more(-over), [idiom] once, since, (be) still, when, (good, the) while (having being), (as, because, whether, while) yet (within).

H5751.strongs_def: {properly, iteration or continuance; used only adverbially (with or without preposition), again, repeatedly, still, more}

H5752.strongs_def: Oded, the name of two Israelites

H5753.kjv_def: do amiss, bow down, make crooked, commit iniquity, pervert, (do) perverse(-ly), trouble, [idiom] turn, do wickedly, do wrong.
H5753.usage: iniquity(4x), perverse(2x), perversely(2x), perverted(2x), amiss(1x), turn(1x), crooked(1x), troubled(1x), wickedly(1x), wrong(1x)

H5755.strongs_def: Ivvah or Avva, a region of Assyria

H5756.strongs_def: to be strong; causatively, to stregthen, i.e. (figuratively) to save (by flight)

H5757.strongs_def: an Avvite or native of Avvah (only plural)

H5758.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H5753 (עָוָה);

H5761.strongs_def: Avvim (as inhabited by Avvites), a place in Palestine (with the article prefix)
H5761.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5762.derivation: or perhaps (עַיּוֹת (as if plural of H5857 (עַי)) (עַיוּת; from H5753 (עָוָה); ruin;
H5762.strongs_def: Avvith (or Avvoth), a place in Palestine

H5766.derivation: or עָוֶל; and (feminine) עַוְלָה; or עוֹלָה; or עֹלָה; from H5765 (עֲוַל);
H5766.usage: iniquity(36x), wickedness(7x), unrighteousness(3x), unjust(2x), perverseness(1x), unjustly(1x), unrighteously(1x), wicked(1x), wickedly(1x), variant(2x)

H5769.strongs_def: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
H5769.kjv_def: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of the) world ([phrase] without end). Compare H5331 (נֶצַח), H5703 (עַד).
H5769.usage: ever(272x), everlasting(63x), old(22x), perpetual(22x), evermore(15x), never(13x), time(6x), ancient(5x), world(4x), always(3x), alway(2x), long(2x), more(2x)

H5771.derivation: or עָווֹן; (2 Kings 7:9; Psalm 51:5 (H7 (אֲבַד))), from H5753 (עָוָה);
H5771.kjv_def: fault, iniquity, mischeif, punishment (of iniquity), sin.

H5772.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to dwell together;

H5774.derivation: a primitive root; to cover (with wings or obscurity); hence (as denominative from H5775 (עוֹף))
H5774.strongs_def: to fly; also (by implication of dimness) to faint (from the darkness of swooning)
H5774.kjv_def: brandish, be (wax) faint, flee away, fly (away), [idiom] set, shine forth, weary.
H5774.usage: fly(17x), faint(3x), brandish(1x), set(1x), weary(1x), variant(2x)

H5775.strongs_def: a bird (as covered with feathers, or rather as covering with wings), often collectively

H5776.strongs_def: {a bird (as covered with feathers, or rather as covering with wings), often collectively}

H5777.derivation: or עֹפֶרֶת; feminine participle active of H6080 (עָפַר);

H5780.strongs_def: Uts, a son of Aram, also a Seirite, and the regions settled by them.
H5780.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H5782.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);
H5782.kjv_def: (a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).
H5782.usage: awake(25x), wake(6x), raise(6x), arise(1x), master(1x), variant(1x)

H5785.strongs_def: skin (as naked); by implication, hide, leather

H5786.kjv_def: blind, put out. See also H5895 (עַיִר).

H5791.kjv_def: bow self, (make) crooked., falsifying, overthrow, deal perversely, pervert, subvert, turn upside down.
H5791.usage: pervert(3x), crooked(2x), bow(1x), falsifying(1x), overthrown(1x), perversely(1x), subvert(1x)

H5793.strongs_def: Uthai, the name of two Israelites

H5794.kjv_def: fierce, [phrase] greedy, mighty, power, roughly, strong.
H5794.usage: strong(12x), fierce(4x), mighty(3x), power(1x), greedy(1x), roughly(1x), stronger(1x)

H5795.strongs_def: a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair)

H5796.strongs_def: {a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair)}

H5797.strongs_def: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
H5797.kjv_def: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.
H5797.usage: strength(60x), strong(17x), power(11x), might(2x), boldness(1x), loud(1x), mighty(1x)

H5798.derivation: or עֻזָּה; feminine of H5797 (עֹז); strength;
H5798.strongs_def: Uzza or Uzzah, the name of five Israelites
H5798.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun
